task_description: Execute Phase 4 (Runtime Integration and Local Developer Experience) and Phase 5 (Unified Product Shell and Design System) of the Quant Ecosystem autonomous roadmap. Phase 4 adds dev scripts, env examples, health endpoints, service discovery, demo seed data, and developer tooling. Phase 5 expands the shared-ui with unified app shell, design tokens, guards, onboarding, state components, and cross-app microfeatures.
